name: Jilin Sino-Microelectronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin Sino-Microelectronics Co., Ltd. designs, manufactures, and markets semiconductor devices in China and internationally. The company provides bipolar transistor, field effect transistor, schottky diode, SCR, fast recovery diode, insulated gate bipolar transistor, discharge tube, LED lighting driver, and intelligent power module. It also involved in foundry business of power semiconductor discrete devices; and chip processing, packaging testing, and product marketing activities. Jilin Sino-Microelectronics Co., Ltd. is based in Jilin City, China.
